name: @echarts-extension/flame
description: ECharts extension chart for hierarchical flame graphs

scripts.test: npm run build:ts && vitest run --config ../../vitest.config.js packages/echarts-flame/test/flame.test.ts
scripts.release: vite build --config ../../vite.config.js --mode production && vite build --config ../../vite.config.js --mode development
